name: ActionSheet
description: Presents a modal bottom sheet with a list of actions.

name: ActionSheetItem
description: Renders a single selectable action row within an `ActionSheet`.

name: AppBar
description: Renders a top app bar with title/subtitle and optional leading/trailing actions.

name: AppShell
description:
Root application shell with stable header, content, footer, and overlay slots.

`AppShell` provides the top-level layout frame for cross-platform apps while
leaving navigation, toolbars, and overlays composable through explicit slots.

name: Avatar
description: Displays a user or entity avatar with image support and initials fallback.

name: AvatarGroup
description: Renders a compact group of avatars with optional overflow handling.

name: Badge
description: Shows a small status, label, or count indicator.

name: Box
description: Base layout primitive for themed spacing, color, border, flex, and responsive props.

name: Breadcrumbs
description: Renders a breadcrumb trail for hierarchical navigation.

name: Button
description:
Theme-aware action control for primary, secondary, destructive, and neutral actions.

Use `Button` for explicit user actions that should follow ZORA's semantic color,
variant, and size recipes across React Native and React Native Web.

name: ButtonGroup
description: Groups multiple `Button` elements with consistent spacing and alignment.

name: Card
description:
Structured content container with built-in heading, description, actions, and footer slots.

Use `Card` for reusable content blocks that should inherit ZORA spacing,
radius, tone, and responsive header layout without hand-assembling primitives.

name: Center
description: Centers children horizontally and vertically within the available space.

name: ChatListItem
description: Chat-style list row with avatar, title, preview text, and unread indicators.

name: Checkbox
description: Binary selection control for toggling a value on or off.

name: CheckboxGroup
description: Renders a group of checkboxes for multi-select values.

name: Chip
description: Compact pill-like control for filters, tags, and quick selections.

name: ChipGroup
description: Renders a row or wrap layout of `Chip` items.

name: CollectionEditor
description: Editor pattern for adding, removing, and reordering a collection of items.

name: ConfirmDialog
description: Confirmation dialog pattern with cancel/confirm actions.

name: Container
description: Constrains page content to semantic widths with responsive padding.

name: DataTable
description: Displays structured tabular data with responsive desktop/mobile layouts.

members.name: rowActions
members.type: ((row: TRow, index: number) => readonly DataTableRowAction<TRow>[]) | undefined

name: DatePicker
description: Date input control with calendar selection and formatted display value.

name: DisclosureSection
description: Expandable section pattern with a summary header and collapsible content.

name: Divider
description: Renders a themed visual separator between content sections.

name: Drawer
description: Side panel overlay for navigation, settings, and secondary content.

name: DropdownMenu
description: Convenience wrapper for rendering a `Menu` as a dropdown.

name: EmptyState
description:
Reusable fallback state for empty lists, missing data, or first-run experiences.

`EmptyState` combines concise copy with optional primary and secondary actions
so apps can guide users without custom card and button wiring.

examples.title: Empty project list
examples.code: <EmptyState title="No projects yet" primaryAction={{ label: 'Create project', onPress }} />

name: FilterBar
description: Horizontal filter/action bar layout with leading/trailing slots.

name: ForgotPasswordForm
description: Password reset form pattern with validation and submit actions.

name: Form
description: Composes fields and actions into a validated form layout.

name: FormActions
description: Standard submit/action area for forms.

name: FormError
description: Displays a form-level validation or submission error message.

name: FormField
description: Connects a controlled form value to a labeled input field with error handling.

name: Grid
description: Creates responsive grid layouts for cards, tiles, and dashboard content.

name: Heading
description:
Structured title primitive for accessible page, section, and card headings.

`Heading` gives consumers a ZORA-owned title API with semantic levels,
responsive sizes, and theme-aware emphasis while preserving header semantics.

name: Hero
description: Hero section pattern for prominent page introductions with actions.

name: Icon
description: Renders an icon from a configured icon provider with theme-aware defaults.

name: IconButton
description: Icon-only button for compact actions; requires an accessible `label`.

name: Image
description: Displays an image with cross-platform source and fit handling.

name: ImagePreview
description: Preview pattern for showing an image with optional metadata and actions.

name: ImageUploadField
description: Form field pattern for picking, previewing, and uploading an image.

name: Inline
description: Arranges children inline with spacing and wrapping behavior.

name: Input
description:
Theme-aware text input with semantic sizing and optional leading/trailing icon slots.

Use `Input` for single-line form controls that need ZORA styling, disabled/read-only
handling, and accessible trailing actions without dropping into Surface directly.

name: InspectorField
description: Inspector row pattern with label, description, and control slot.

name: List
description: List container pattern for composing `ListRow` and `ListSection`.

name: ListRow
description: Row pattern for lists with leading/trailing slots and optional press behavior.

name: ListSection
description: Section wrapper for lists with optional title and description.

name: MediaCard
description: Card layout with an optional media/header region and structured content slots.

name: Menu
description: Presents a list of actions as a menu with optional icons and intent styling.

name: MessageBubble
description: Message bubble pattern for chat UIs with direction and status styling.

name: MetricCard
description: Highlights a key metric with label, value, and optional trend/actions.

name: Modal
description: Modal dialog surface with header/content/footer slots.

name: NavigationItem
description: Renders a single navigation entry with active/disabled state support.

name: NavigationList
description: Renders a navigation list from route metadata with active state mapping.

name: Notice
description: Notice pattern for inline feedback with tone, title, and actions.

name: OtpForm
description: One-time passcode form pattern with digit input and submit actions.

name: Pagination
description: Pagination control for navigating between pages of results.

name: PaletteItem
description: Tile item pattern for palettes and option grids.

name: Panel
description: Semantic wrapper around `Card` for panel-style page sections.

name: PostCard
description: Social-style post card pattern with author, content, media, and actions.

name: Progress
description: Progress indicator for determinate and indeterminate loading states.

name: Radio
description: Single-choice selection control used within a radio group.

name: RadioGroup
description: Renders a group of radio options for selecting a single value.

name: Rating
description: Displays a star-based rating value with optional half steps.

name: ResponsivePanel
description:
Adaptive secondary surface that can render as an inline panel, drawer, or modal.

Use `ResponsivePanel` for tool panes and admin/detail flows that need the same
content to work across compact mobile screens and wider desktop layouts.

name: Screen
description: Page-level container with standard background and optional scroll behavior.

name: ScreenSection
description: Screen section layout with optional title, description, and actions.

name: SearchBar
description: Search input with leading icon and optional trailing action.

name: SectionHeader
description: Section heading pattern with optional description and action slot.

name: Select
description: Select control for choosing a value from a list of options.

name: SelectableItem
description: Adds selection behavior to arbitrary child content via render props.

signatures.label: ({ id, trigger, disabled = false, children }: SelectableItemProps) => React.JSX.Element

name: SelectionProvider
description: Provides selection state for building selectable lists and grids.

signatures.label:
({
  children,
  selectedIds,
  defaultSelectedIds,
  mode,
  disabled,
  onSelectionChange,
}: SelectionProviderProps) => React.JSX.Element

parameters.name:
{
  children,
  selectedIds,
  defaultSelectedIds,
  mode,
  disabled,
  onSelectionChange,
}

name: SettingsLayout
description: Settings page layout with app bar, sidebar, and scrollable content area.

name: SettingsRow
description: Settings row pattern with title, description/meta, and optional trailing content.

name: Show
description: Conditionally renders children for responsive display and breakpoint-based visibility.

name: SidebarLayout
description: Responsive layout with a sidebar and main content area (and optional aside).

name: SignInForm
description: Sign-in form pattern with identifier and password fields.

name: SignUpForm
description: Sign-up form pattern with structured fields and validation.

name: Skeleton
description: Generic skeleton placeholder for loading states.

name: SkeletonCard
description: Skeleton placeholder that matches the structure of a `Card`.

name: SkeletonList
description: Skeleton placeholder list for loading states in list views.

name: SkeletonText
description: Multi-line skeleton placeholder for text content.

name: Spacer
description: Adds flexible or fixed empty space in layout compositions.

name: Stack
description: Arranges layout items in one direction with theme spacing.

name: Surface
description: Provides a semantic themed region for elevated, subtle, or bordered content.

name: SwitchField
description: Labeled switch field pattern built on `SettingsRow`.

name: Tabs
description: Tab navigation for switching between views or content sections.

name: Text
description:
Structured copy primitive for theme-aware app text.

`Text` owns normal body, caption, label, code, and supporting-copy variants so
consumers do not need to import lower-level Surface typography directly.

name: Textarea
description: Multi-line text input with consistent ZORA field styling.

members.name: accessibilityActions
members.type: readonly Readonly<{ name: AccessibilityActionName | string; label?: string | undefined; }>[] | undefined

members.name: selection
members.type: { start: number; end?: number | undefined; } | undefined

name: ThemeComposer
description: UI for composing and applying a theme via structured controls.

name: TileGrid
description: Responsive grid layout for arranging tile content.

name: Timeline
description: Timeline pattern for displaying a sequence of events.

name: TimePicker
description: Time input control with wheel selection and formatted display value.

name: Toast
description: Renders a toast notification message.

name: ToastProvider
description: Provides toast state and rendering context for `useToast` and `Toast`.

name: Toolbar
description: Horizontal toolbar surface for grouping actions and controls.

name: ToolbarAction
description: Convenience icon action for toolbars with active state styling.

name: TopbarLayout
description: Layout that composes a top bar with optional sidebar and content.

name: TreeItem
description: Single tree node row used within `TreeView`.

name: TreeView
description: Tree view pattern for hierarchical navigation and expandable lists.

description: Accesses selection state provided by `SelectionProvider`.

name: ZoraDrawerContent
description: Standard drawer content pattern for ZORA navigation lists.

name: ZoraProvider
description:
Installs the ZORA theme runtime and underlying Surface theme provider.

Wrap an app with `ZoraProvider` once near the root so components, patterns,
layouts, and theme hooks resolve the same design tokens and color mode.

name: ZoraTabBar
description: Bottom tab bar pattern with badge support and active state styling.

members.name: insets
members.type: { top?: number; bottom?: number; left?: number; right?: number; } | undefined
